statement: In every magma, Equation 2738 (`x = ((y * y) * (x * y)) * z`) implies Equation 3451 (`x * y = z * (w * (u * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0022
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op x y)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w (op u y)))
